title: Hindura ijambo ryibanga
subtitle: Kuvugurura umutekano wa konte yawe
requirements: Ugomba kuba ufite ibishushanyo 8+, inyuguti nkuru, inyuguti nto, umubare, & char idasanzwe

messages.invalid: Ijambobanga rigomba kuba rifite byibuze inyuguti 8, inyuguti nkuru, inyuguti nto, umubare umwe ninyuguti yihariye
